title: Debut, or, Objects of the Field of Debris as Currently Catalogued
original_title: Debut, or, Objects of the Field of Debris as Currently Catalogued
overview: A young filmmaker named Julian stumbles on a hidden book tied to a vanished art forger and the perfect mystery for his next film pitch. But as coincidences mount and paranoia sets in, he begins to question what’s real, who’s watching him, and whether he’s directing the story or being directed by it.
